summary.shape_sentence: RTH opened in rotation, pushed into a late-morning high under 24,700, broke sharply through noon, then rebounded and faded into a weak close.

goat.note: No clear RTH star label is visible; the standout RTH move was the noon selloff from the 24,660s into the 24,300s.

red_circles.behavior: Mostly printed near local highs and rollover points; strongest signals came at the late-morning top, noon continuation lower, and late-afternoon fade.

green_circles.behavior: Mostly printed at reaction lows during bounce attempts; best response came after the noon flush and into the early-afternoon recovery.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply clustered around 24520-24540 and 24665-24705; upper supply was respected and later bounces into mid-24500s also stalled.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand appeared around 24365-24390 and 24300-24330; higher support failed at noon, deeper support held and sparked the afternoon rebound.

time_markers.10am_blue: Opening rotation was settling and transitioning into the late-morning push higher.
time_markers.12pm_red: This marked the key breakdown window, with price rolling over from the morning high and accelerating lower.
time_markers.2pm_green: The market was rebounding from the noon low but remained below stronger overhead supply.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Price closed near 24,400 after a failed afternoon hold, finishing weak and closer to the low than the high.

takeaway: Bearish rotational day with a failed late-morning push, a clean noon flush, and only a corrective afternoon rebound that could not reverse the session.
